_note: Seeded criticality allowlist (ADR-0013, BR-EFF-006). Criticality is ASSIGNED here, never inferred from prose. A safety/compliance artifact can NEVER be classified dead, NEVER enter a prune-plan, and NEVER lose keeper status — regardless of fire/cite count, cost, or value-density. Keys are criticality classes; values are artifact uids (kind:id, e.g. hook:forge:secret-scan, rule:security-baseline). An artifact absent from this map is `normal`. Err toward `safety` for security-adjacent artifacts: a false `safety` tag keeps a harmless artifact; a false `normal` tag risks deleting a safety net.
